title: Untitled Thriller — short_form

config.voice_suffix: naturalistic dialogue delivery, motivated breath, cinematic intimacy, synthetic talent only
config.cinematography: shallow depth of field, tight framing, rack focus on threat, desaturated or cool grade
config.performance_mode: menace, controlled affect, subtext dense, stillness as threat
config.pacing: slow burn to sudden violence, holds longer than comfortable, quiet before storm

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Actor-001: identical character face, wardrobe, hair, same eye-line and blocking -- seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. Wide establishing shot, static or slow crane, sets geography and scale, no dialogue. Single hard key source, strong shadow pools, chiaroscuro depth. Motivated naturalistic coverage, performance-driven camera, practical lighting, real locations, no stylistic flourish. Narrative function: Pre-title hook, in medias res or thematic statement. Finish on gesture peak or deliberate stillness -- never hold dead frame.
shots.action_line: We open on a world already in motion.

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Actor-001: identical character face, wardrobe, hair, same eye-line and blocking -- seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. Motivated naturalistic coverage, performance-driven camera, practical lighting, real locations, no stylistic flourish. Performance: body forward, words clipped, driven pace, no margin, physical press. Narrative function: Inciting incident, the world changes. Finish on gesture peak or deliberate stillness -- never hold dead frame.
shots.speech_text: [DIALOGUE: inciting beat -- write from logline: A hitman must protect the witness who can bury him.]
shots.action_line: The moment everything changes. No going back.

guardrails: Synthetic performers only -- no real persons depicted without explicit clearance
No real locations identified as specific addresses
Violence: suggest, do not gratify -- implied is preferred over explicit
No content that could be mistaken for documentary or real events
Legal Gate 0 must pass before STUDIO render
Violence and threat: atmospheric and suggestive, not gratuitous
qa_rules: Every shot with dialogue must use MCU or tighter for lip-sync fidelity
Wide establishing shots must contain no audible dialogue
Continuity lock token must appear in every non-insert shot
Director style modifier must be present in every video_prompt
Format: short_form -- verify total seconds within target range
Identity lock consistent across all character shots
Color grade lock consistent across all shots in scene
Performance beat specified in every dialogue shot
